title: How to sync "Assignee" from GitHub to Monday.com
excerpt:
Hello, 
Has anyone been able to sync the “assignee” field from GitHub over to Monday.com? I’ve tried many different things, including making sure that the users have the same name and email address on both platforms, but…

posts.author: rfontdevila (Roger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Has anyone been able to sync the “assignee” field from GitHub over to Monday.com? I’ve tried many different things, including making sure that the users have the same name and email address on both platforms, but I have not been able to assign someone on a GitHub issue and have that reflected on the Monday.com task. Other fields work fine (title, body, labels, etc.).

Thanks in advance!

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Have you tried using make/zapier? Here are your options for make https://www.make.com/en/help/app/github
